name: The Copper Skillet
based_on: A home-cook recipe blog in the RecipeTin Eats / Pinch of Yum tradition — categorized recipe index, printable cards, and a personable about page.
summary: A weeknight-dinner recipe collection with a filterable/searchable index and recipe pages that include a serving-size scaler, a print-friendly card, and step-by-step method.
sections: Home — featured recipe plus latest grid
Recipe index with category, cuisine, and dietary filters and a search box
Recipe page — hero photo, ingredients, numbered method, serving-size scaler, print card, prep/cook times
setup_questions: What's your name and the blog's name?
What cuisine or style is the focus (e.g. Mediterranean weeknight, baking, one-pot)?
Give me 3-5 starter recipes, including one signature dish, with ingredients and steps.
Which dietary tags should the filters support (e.g. vegetarian, gluten-free, 30-minute)?
photo_terms: kitchen ingredients on wooden cutting board
cook plating food in home kitchen
